channel.title: Embodied-Ai on Sinclair Huang, HEC Liège, Executive DBA

item.title: When AI Leaves the Screen: Will We Need a Worker, a Caregiver, or a Companion First?
item.description: When AI leaves the screen: worker, caregiver, or companion?China is turning factories into schools for robots. Tesla is betting on general-purpose labour. But Physical AI’s most urgent value may be fi
